titleStmt.title: SII 18.99: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 99. (B.K. No. 11 of 1933-34.) BAṄKĀPUR, BANKAPUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Right pillar at the entrance into the central shrine of the Nagarēśvaradēva temple.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the reign (year not specified) of Tribhuvanamalladēva, Śrīmukha, Vaiśākha Amāvāsyā corresponding to A.D. 1093 April 28, Thursday (not verifiable).

It states that Danḍanāyaka Ḍākarasa made a grant of some taxes for burning a prepetual lamp to god Nakarēśvara. The gift was entrusted to Chandrabhūshaṇadēva the āchārya of the temple. It is also stated that the donor authorised heggaḍe Mahadēvaṇa to collect the sāda and baṇṇige taxes.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: This is engraved in continuation of No. 139 below.
div.p:
© svasti śrīmaccāḷukya tribhuvanamalladēvavarṣada
śrīmukhasauvatsarada vaiśākhadama
vāse vyatīpātadaṁdu śrīmeda(ṁ)ṇḍanāyakaṁ ḍāka
rasamā heggaḍe mahadēvaṇaṁge sāda baṇnige
ya teṟeya(ṁ)nettalvēḷdu kāruṇyaṁgeydu
nakarēśvaradēvara puravarggakkaṁ dēvara baḷiya
bāḍaṁ bāḍakka sāda baṇnige kārukadeṟeyaṁ
nakharēśvaradācāryya caṁdrabhūśaṇadē
kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi dēvara nandā
biṭṭaru Idharmmavanāvanāgalaḷidātaṁ
si kurukṣētradalsāyira kavileya
rvva brāhmaṇaranaḷida pātaka .
Digital edition of SII 18.99 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
